title: Custom World Icons
description: Customize world icons upon world creation!
body:
Allows you to customize world icons upon world creation.

 
Features:

        -Ability to add custom world icons.
        -Higher resolution for icons in the world list.
        -Translations for multiple languages.

Languages:

        -English
        -Spanish
        -German
        -Polish
        -Italian
        -Russian
        -Japanese
        -Serbian
        -Portuguese


 
 
I'm open to adding more languages, I can add them two ways:

            -You translate it yourself and send me the file.
            -I use google translate (prone to errors but may be faster).
